final_prompt.prompt:
Design a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion.

Style/medium: bold typographic poster design with layered artistic lettering, contemporary commercial advertising aesthetic
Composition: 16:9 horizontal format, complex layered layout with overlapping text elements and product integration, balanced visual hierarchy
Subject: dynamic artistic typography with stacked letterforms, products or main subjects partially overlapping and obscuring portions of text
Scene/backdrop: promotional e-commerce themed environment, modern commercial setting
Lighting/mood: vibrant energetic lighting, attention-grabbing promotional atmosphere
Color palette: bold contrasting colors with clear visual separation, multiple accent colors arranged in structured layers
Materials/textures: clean vector typography with subtle dimensional effects, product photography integration
Text (verbatim): "跨境电商促销"
Constraints: must maintain readability despite complexity; layered elements must not create visual chaos; 16:9 aspect ratio required
Avoid: cluttered messy composition; illegible text; generic stock photo aesthetic; excessive decorative elements without purpose; 8K stuffer words
